final:
module top_module(
    input [4:0] A,B,C,D,
    input [1:0] disable,
    output reg[4:0] O
);always @* begin
        case (disable) 
            2'b00 : begin
                O <= A;
            end
            2'b01 : begin
                O <= B;
            end
            2'b10 : begin
                O <= C;
            end
            2'b11 : begin
                O <= D;
            end
        endcase
    end

endmodule
